trait.title: TemplatePrestige
trait.Name: [color=#70ff60]Template Prestige[/color]
trait.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] Main-hand is a [color=#ffff50]bare fist[/color]:

     perform [color=#ffff50]1 extra attack[/color] against the target

[color=#707070]Replace this text with your real effect once the template is working[/color]
trait.Description_Unit: On attack with a bare fist: perform 1 extra attack.

lore.title: TemplatePrestige
lore.text: Replace this with your prestige lore after the template is visible and working in-game.
